name: 8p23_1_pericentric_inversion_polymorphism
description: 8p23.1 polymorphic pericentric inversion (~4.7 Mb) between the two REPP/REPD inverted SD blocks. Heterozygote frequency ~26% in Europeans; predisposes to recurrent t(4;8) translocations and 8p23.1 microdeletion/duplication CNVs in offspring.

architecture.internal_structure: Inversion mediated by two large inverted SD blocks at 8p23.1 (REPP proximal, REPD distal); inversion variant carries defensin and OR clusters in opposite orientation relative to GRCh38.
